PERA SLAM

2026

The University of Peradeniya Tournament

Join us for the most prestigious tennis championship in Kandy. Three days of intense competition, excellent facilities, and unforgettable moments.

Everything you need to know about this year's championship

Tournament Dates

May 1-3, 2026

3 days of competitive tennis action

Venue

Kandy Gardens Club

Premium Tennis Courts

Categories

5 Age Groups

Singles & Doubles Tournaments

Championship Trophy

Compete for the prestigious Pera Slam Championship trophy and eternal glory

Make Connections

Get tips and training sessions from experienced players.

Quality Experience

Well-planned matches focused on fun and engagement

PERA SLAM 2026

The premier tennis championship in Kandy, Sri Lanka. Join us for 3 days of classy tennis, fierce competition, and unforgettable moments at the heart of Kandy.
